papers.title: Auctions with Contract Design
papers.abstract: We consider a new auction model where the bidders' utilities and the auctioneer's revenue depend on a quality factor of the transaction determined by costly and strategic investments of the bidders. Applications of our model include ad auctions, government concessions and crowdsourcing contests. Crucially, these quality-enhancing efforts made by the bidders are often sunk costs incurred prior to the allocation, creating a fundamental moral hazard problem where the risk of losing the auction discourages investments. In this paper, we study the design of revenue-maximizing contracts integrated into auctions: the auctioneer commits to a transfer rule that rewards the winner for the ex-post realized quality of the transaction to incentivize higher effort. Our new framework is a natural generalization of both the auction theory and the principal-agent model. We consider both the second-price and the first-price auctions. We show that natural symmetric Bayes Nash equilibria exist in both auctions. Assuming these natural equilibria are played by the bidders and the number of bidders is large, we study linear contracts and derive the optimal reward factor of the transfer rule that maximizes the auctioneer's revenue. As the main result, we show that the optimal reward factor converges to the auctioneer's marginal benefit from the quality, as the number of bidders grows. That is, it is optimal for the auctioneer to fully pass through the quality value to the winner. This observation is largely independent of the auction rule used: we derive a revenue equivalence theorem showing that the revenue remains the same as long as symmetric Bayes Nash equilibria exist. Lastly, by quantitatively comparing with the standard auctions where no quality reward is used, we show that the use of contracts effectively improves the revenue by incentivizing high investments from the bidders.

summarySections.backgroundAndQuestion: 传统拍卖通常只考虑出价竞争，但现实中投标人的努力（如广告质量）往往在竞标前投入且不可见，导致‘沉没成本’下的投资不足。本文关注这种道德风险问题：当投标人因可能落标而不愿提前投资时，拍卖方如何通过事后奖励机制激励高质量投入。
summarySections.modelAndSetup: 模型包含多个投标人，各自拥有私有类型并选择影响交易质量的隐藏行动。拍卖方运行标准拍卖（如二价或一价），同时承诺一个基于最终质量的线性奖励合同。投标人决定行动和报价，目标是最大化自身期望效用，而拍卖方设计合同以提升总收益。
summarySections.contributionsAndResults: 论文证明，在对称贝叶斯纳什均衡下，最优线性奖励因子会随着投标人数量增加而收敛至拍卖方从质量中获得的边际收益。这意味着‘完全价值传递’——将自身质量收益全部奖励给赢家——是最优策略，且该结论在多种拍卖机制间具有收入等价性。
summarySections.methodsAndTechniques: 作者通过刻画投标人的阈值型均衡策略，并结合渐近分析推导最优合同参数。关键技术在于利用自然出价策略简化均衡分析，并借助固定点定理证明均衡存在性，最后通过收入等价定理将结果推广到一类拍卖机制。
summarySections.limitationsAndReadingValue: 模型假设类型独立同分布且合同为线性，限制了对异质性和非线性激励的探讨。尽管如此，论文的价值在于清晰揭示了合同如何缓解事前投资的道德风险，其模型融合拍卖与合同理论，为机制设计提供了新范式，值得重视其核心思想与证明框架。

papers.title: Tighter Bounds for the Random-Offerer Mechanism in Bilateral Trade
papers.titleZh: 双边贸易中随机提议者机制的更紧界限
papers.abstract: The random-offerer mechanism for bilateral trade selects the seller or the buyer uniformly and lets the selected agent make a profit-maximizing take-it-or-leave-it offer. Let $ρ_{\rm RO}$ be the infimum, over independent value distributions, of the mechanism's gains from trade divided by first-best gains from trade. We prove $\frac1π\le ρ_{\rm RO}<0.460242308085529$. For the lower bound, we improve the previous guarantee from approximately $0.317844$ to $1/π\approx 0.318310$. The proof uses a parameterized Lagrangian bound for pointwise-monotone allocations. At multiplier one, this bound has coefficient $2/π$, and the Lagrangian separates into two terms controlled by the optimal seller-offering and buyer-offering profits. For the upper bound, we construct an explicit family consisting of a truncated equal-revenue buyer and a seller distribution with a tilted power-law lower tail and a constant-virtual-cost segment. The family satisfies $\operatorname{FB}/\operatorname{RO}>2.17276852308451$, improving the previous explicit ratio $2.0749$; rigorous interval arithmetic certifies the numerical inequality.

summarySections.backgroundAndQuestion: 为什么简单的双边交易机制无法实现全部收益？该问题源于买卖双方拥有私有价值且缺乏信任，导致即使交易有利也无法达成。Myerson-Satterthwaite 定理已证明不存在完全有效机制，本文聚焦于‘随机提议者’这一简单规则，在独立分布下研究其最坏情况下的效率损失，旨在缩小此前未知的精确性能边界。
summarySections.modelAndSetup: 模型考虑一个卖家和一个买家，各自知道自己的估值但不知道对方的，值独立分布。机制以相等概率选择一方作为提议者，其提出不可协商的价格，另一方决定是否接受。目标是比较该机制的实际收益与理想状态（只要买方估值高于卖方就成交）的最大可能收益之比，并分析其在所有分布下的下确界性能。
summarySections.contributionsAndResults: 论文显著收紧了随机提议者机制的最坏效率比界限：首次将下界从约0.3178提升至1/π≈0.3183，同时构造出新分布族使上界低于0.4602，打破了此前超过0.48的估计。这表明该机制至少能实现约31.8%的第一优效率，但无法超过46%，大幅压缩了理论未知区间。
summarySections.methodsAndTechniques: 下界证明采用带参数的拉格朗日松弛方法，通过固定乘子将增益分解为买卖双方最优报价利润之和，并利用点态单调分配与虚拟值结构进行控制；上界则通过显式构造一类截断等收益买方与倾斜幂律卖方分布，结合区间算术严格验证积分不等式，确保数值结果的可靠性。
summarySections.limitationsAndReadingValue: 结果依赖特定分布构造和对称拉格朗日乘子选择，是否可达最优界限仍开放。机制虽简单但分析深刻，证明技巧融合了机制设计与优化思想。最值得阅读的是其统一的拉格朗日框架与高精度数值验证方法，为理解简单机制的极限提供了新工具和 tighter benchmark。

papers.title: Equilibrium stability as a driver of cooperation among Q-learners
papers.titleZh: 均衡稳定性作为Q学习者之间合作的驱动因素
papers.abstract: Algorithmic collusion among pricing algorithms has raised concerns about sustained supra-competitive prices and their implications for social welfare. Existing work has largely focused on the probability that reinforcement-learning algorithms converge to cooperative strategies, typically under the assumption that exploration vanishes over time. Motivated by the observation that algorithms deployed in practice are likely to continue exploring in order to remain adaptive to changing environments, we study learning dynamics under constant exploration. In this setting, the relevant question is no longer whether an algorithm converges to a particular strategy profile, but rather what fraction of time the algorithms spend playing cooperative strategies. Even in the benchmark case of the repeated Prisoner's Dilemma with one-period memory, this yields high-dimensional stochastic learning dynamics, for which a complete analytic treatment is intractable. We show that cooperative strategies can be dominant in this time-averaged sense and derive a boundary predicting when such dominance arises, based on the expected dynamics of the Q-learning process. Extensive simulations show that this boundary is a strong predictor for non-defection-dominated behaviour under epsilon-greedy Q-learning.

summarySections.backgroundAndQuestion: 现有研究多关注强化学习算法是否收敛到合作策略，通常假设探索会随时间消失。然而现实中算法需持续探索以适应环境变化。本文因此提出新问题：在恒定探索下，算法无法收敛，此时合作应如何衡量？答案是看长期中处于合作策略的时间比例。这更贴近实际部署场景，也引出新的理论挑战。
summarySections.modelAndSetup: 模型基于重复囚徒困境，两个Q学习者具有一期记忆，状态为空间为前一轮动作组合。双方采用ε-贪婪策略更新Q值，学习率与探索率均保持恒定。该设定导致系统不收敛而持续转移于不同策略构型之间。研究焦点从‘是否学会合作’转为‘多久处于合作状态’。
summarySections.contributionsAndResults: 论文发现即使在非收敛动态中，合作仍可在时间平均意义上主导行为。作者提出一个预测边界，用于判断何时合作策略占据多数时间。该边界基于各均衡策略（如全背叛AD与赢留输变WSLS）的相对稳定性，由期望Q学习动态中的最优Q值差异决定，仿真显示其预测力极强。
summarySections.methodsAndTechniques: 作者将联合Q值与状态的马尔可夫过程投影至有限策略构型空间，形成隐马尔可夫模型。通过分析期望动态下的驻定点稳定性，比较不同纳什均衡（如AD与WSLS）逃离所需克服的Q值反转势垒高度。利用模拟验证边界性能，并用宏观F1分数量化其分类能力。
summarySections.limitationsAndReadingValue: 理论依赖小学习率假设以确保遍历性，高折现因子下模拟可能未达稳态。结果聚焦特定策略集，未涵盖所有可能行为。但论文价值在于重构了算法共谋的评估范式——从收敛概率转向时间占比。最值得读的是其对‘稳定性驱动合作’的新机制刻画及实证验证方式。

papers.title: Equilibrium Information Aggregation under Machine Learning
papers.titleZh: 机器学习下的均衡信息聚合
papers.abstract: We introduce a framework for studying the equilibrium effects of machine learning. Agents process information using a Chow and Liu (1968) tree, a widely-used machine learning procedure that admits a closed-form solution. We apply the model to an asset market with dispersed information based on Hellwig (1980). The price mechanism fails to aggregate the information extracted by the algorithm, even approximately. While there are partial equilibrium benefits from access to algorithms, the equilibrium price aggregates less information than the rational equilibrium. Equilibrium typically features diverse world-models, demands, and utilities, even with ex ante identical agents.

summarySections.backgroundAndQuestion: 传统资产市场理论认为价格能有效聚合分散信息，但现实中交易者越来越多依赖机器学习算法处理海量信息。本文关注的问题是：当交易者使用算法而非贝叶斯更新来形成信念时，价格还能否有效反映私人信息？这触及信息效率理论的核心前提——理性预期均衡的稳健性，在算法普遍使用的背景下是否依然成立。
summarySections.modelAndSetup: 模型基于Hellwig（1980）的资产市场框架，风险厌恶的交易者拥有私有信号并观察市场价格，通过最大化期望效用决定需求。关键改变在于，交易者使用Chow-Liu树（CLT）算法从历史数据中学习变量间的依赖结构，而非精确贝叶斯更新。CLT选择一个树状图结构来近似联合分布，使Kullback-Leibler散度最小，从而简化高维推理。
summarySections.contributionsAndResults: 论文证明，即使供给噪声趋近于零，均衡价格也无法像理性预期那样几乎完全揭示私人信息。价格的信息相关性被严格低于贝叶斯基准，因为算法可能将信号直接链接到价格而非基本面，导致交易者忽略私有信号。结果表明，价格的信息聚合能力存在非消失的上限，为算法交易的持续盈利提供了理论解释。
summarySections.methodsAndTechniques: 作者通过嵌套不动点论证证明均衡存在，并利用正态变量下KL散度与相关系数的关系，将CLT的选择转化为对最大相关边的贪心搜索。关键证明借助数据处理不等式：若价格高度相关于价值，则也应更相关于信号，诱使算法连接信号至价格，进而削弱需求对信号的响应，破坏市场出清，形成矛盾。
summarySections.limitationsAndReadingValue: 模型局限于一阶依赖树和单一资产，限制了对深层神经网络或跨资产信息传播的推广。但其价值在于清晰揭示了算法归纳偏差如何通过反馈循环破坏信息聚合。最值得读的是其模型抽象方式——将机器学习视为信念形成机制，以及由此产生的非直观均衡特性，对理解算法化市场的稳定性极具启发。

papers.title: Reveal, Correct, Then Pay: Encrypted Mempools and Perpetual Funding Security
papers.titleZh: 揭示、纠正，然后支付：加密内存池与永续资金安全
papers.abstract: Encrypted mempools are designed to hide transaction contents until execution order is fixed, preventing many victim dependent forms of maximal extractable value. This paper studies a different class of attack in the form of self-authored state manipulation, in which the attacker knows its own transaction and owns a downstream claim on the state that transaction changes. Perpetual futures funding is a canonical example. The funding signal determines a transfer rate, while receiving side open interest is the transfer base. In a commit then reveal mempool, an adaptive corrective transaction cannot enter the already committed batch. Privacy can therefore create an economic reaction gap even when cryptographic decryption overhead is negligible. We microfound correction through executable arbitrage opportunities. Correctors choose order size against local price impact and inventory cost, while the protocol information schedule determines which opportunities are actionable. The ordering barrier removes ordinary adaptive searchers from the closed stage. It therefore yields a closed stage correction rate below the adaptive correction rate whenever positive adaptive capacity becomes available after reveal. The distortion entering a funding window is multiplied by an explicit response factor. Transaction privacy can also reduce capitalization of predictable funding into entry prices, producing a second amplification channel. The resulting local security index separates attacker blindness, correction shielding, and capitalization shielding.

summarySections.backgroundAndQuestion: 传统加密内存池旨在通过隐藏交易内容防止抢跑等MEV攻击，但本文指出，对于自发起的状态操纵攻击（如操控永续合约资金费率），隐私反而可能加剧问题。因为攻击者知晓自己的交易，而纠错者却被延迟获取信息，导致反应滞后，形成经济层面的反应间隙，从而放大操纵收益。
summarySections.modelAndSetup: 模型设定中，协议按提交、揭示、执行顺序运行，揭示前无法提交依赖明文的纠正交易，形成‘排序屏障’。攻击者制造信号偏差并持有受益头寸，纠错者基于价格影响和库存成本决定响应规模。资金支付取决于信号平均值与接收方名义本金，分自有与新建头寸两类。
summarySections.contributionsAndResults: 论文发现，加密内存池可能因延长反应间隙而增加攻击价值，尤其当攻击者保留大部分信息优势时。提出了‘揭示—纠正—测量—支付’新规则，显示通过设置纠正缓冲期可有效限制额外提取，并给出明确的安全边界条件，挑战了‘隐私必然提升安全’的普遍认知。
summarySections.methodsAndTechniques: 作者通过构建修正部门的泊松到达机会模型，结合局部价格影响与库存成本，推导出封闭阶段与公开阶段的修正速率差异。利用指数衰减模型刻画偏差消除过程，并通过比较静态分析得出反应间隙对攻击价值的单调递增关系，核心在于分离信息屏蔽与反应能力下降的影响。
summarySections.limitationsAndReadingValue: 模型假设修正行为呈线性响应且机会流稳定，现实中可能存在非线性与波动。机制依赖额外等待期，可能影响系统效率。但论文价值在于揭示了加密与应用层组合的设计盲点，其反应间隙与双账本安全指数为后续机制设计提供了关键分析框架，值得深入阅读。

papers.title: Discriminative Barrier Functions for Safe Adversarial Imitation Learning from Observation
papers.titleZh: 用于安全对抗模仿学习的判别式屏障函数
papers.abstract: Inverse Reinforcement Learning (IRL) algorithms are powerful tools for learning from and generalizing expert demonstrations, but they often rely on unconstrained exploration, rendering them unsafe for real-world deployment. Meanwhile, Control Barrier Functions (CBFs) can guarantee the safety of control systems, but the analytical design of CBFs can be time-consuming and esoteric. In this work, we address these limitations jointly by constraining reward function candidacy during IRL to the space of CBFs, yielding a formulation that exhibits safe online control with continuous experiential improvement. Crucially, this framework enables the data-driven recovery of barrier functions directly from unlabeled expert observations. We demonstrate that the recovered barrier function is robust to unsafe states entirely absent from the expert data. Furthermore, we benchmark our method against standard IRL baselines in a simulated navigation environment, demonstrating improved safety performance. Finally, we investigate the trade-offs of planning-based versus policy-based IRL methods across both simulation and a real world obstacle avoidance task.

summarySections.backgroundAndQuestion: 现有模仿学习方法通常依赖动作标注数据或允许自由探索，但在真实机器人部署中既难以获取动作标签又面临探索不安全的问题。本文关注仅从状态观测中学习模仿策略的同时，如何避免进入专家数据中从未出现的危险状态。传统方法缺乏显式的抑制机制来阻止不安全行为，导致在线学习过程存在安全隐患。
summarySections.modelAndSetup: 论文研究在无动作标签的观察模仿学习（IRLfO）设定下，如何联合学习一个既能区分专家行为又能识别危险状态的判别函数。输入仅为专家的状态轨迹和在线交互数据，输出为策略与屏障函数。通过将屏障函数嵌入对抗模仿框架，并在模拟导航与真实小车避障任务中测试其对未见障碍物的泛化能力及安全性表现。
summarySections.contributionsAndResults: 提出判别式屏障函数（DBF），首次将控制屏障函数（CBF）的前向不变性约束引入对抗模仿学习的目标中，实现了从纯观测数据中恢复可解释的安全边界。实验表明，DBF显著降低碰撞率，在未知障碍环境中实现零碰撞，且规划式方法DBF-MPAIL在硬件部署中成功率远超基线，验证了其安全性和泛化性。
summarySections.methodsAndTechniques: 核心思想是将标准判别器的损失空间限制为满足离散时间CBF条件的成本函数类，使学到的判别函数天然具备区分安全与危险转移的能力。通过Wasserstein GAN框架结合梯度惩罚进行优化，无需显式安全标签。该方法在训练中隐式定义‘安全’为可维持向前演化的状态集合，从而赋予模型对未见危险的抑制能力。
summarySections.limitationsAndReadingValue: 当前方法的安全信号仅作用于判别器，未直接影响策略的价值函数；且当专家数据覆盖狭窄时可能过度保守。尽管如此，论文清晰展示了控制理论结构如何提升模仿学习的安全性。最值得阅读的是其问题设定与方法设计，为安全在线学习提供了可推广的新范式。

papers.title: Kepler-Encoder-v0.1: Towards a Multimodal Embedding Model for Robots
papers.titleZh: Kepler-Encoder-v0.1：面向机器人多模态嵌入模型的探索
papers.abstract: A robot must understand the state of its own body, but a camera sees only part of it. Force and contact leave almost no trace in a single frame, and raw vision features read force at $R^2$ at or below $0.10$ on every robot we test. We present Kepler-Encoder-v0.1, a robot-first multimodal encoder that treats robot state as a modality and fuses vision, proprioception, and force/torque into a single shared latent with a learned-query cross-attention layer, trained self-supervised by masked cross-modal prediction under the LeJEPA/SIGReg objective. At evaluation only vision enters, which poses a sharp question. Does fusing state into training make the vision-only latent carry anything the pixels do not already contain? On the RH20T corpus the answer is yes, precisely where the camera is weakest. On held-out scenes, the vision-only latent recovers end-effector state, and force in particular, significantly above both raw frozen-ViT features and a compute-matched vision-only control on every sensored robot, though absolute force recovery at a single timestep is modest; on motor state, which the camera largely sees, it is statistically tied with the strongest vision baselines, and it is the only feature whose latent geometry tracks state. A single embodiment-agnostic encoder covers four robots, and a data-matched control shows this breadth reflects embodiment diversity rather than data volume. The frozen latent is directly useful. Its own cross-modal prediction error is a training-free invalid-state monitor (AUROC $0.90$ on out-of-range states, $0.69$ on scene-swapped states), and a diffusion decoder (PixNerd) reconstructs the camera frame from the latent, confirming the spatial compression preserves world-state. This report validates the single-timestep case; native-rate temporal fusion is the next step.

summarySections.backgroundAndQuestion: 机器人仅靠视觉难以感知自身状态，尤其是接触力和关节扭矩等物理量在单帧图像中几乎不可见。现有方法通常将视觉特征与机器人状态拼接处理，导致模型无法从纯视觉信号中恢复出被遮挡的身体状态。本文提出的问题是：能否通过在训练中融合多模态传感器信号，使纯视觉编码器学到超出像素本身的信息？这触及表示学习的根本挑战——如何让模型利用互补信号提升主导模态的能力。
summarySections.modelAndSetup: 模型接收RGB图像、本体感觉（关节角度、速度）和末端执行器信号（力/力矩、位姿），通过一个共享的潜在空间进行融合，并在推理时仅使用图像输入。训练采用掩码跨模态预测目标，即隐藏某一模态并用其余模态预测其目标嵌入。评估设定为冻结编码器后，在未见过的场景中测试纯视觉嵌入能否线性解码出真实机器人状态，从而检验其是否真正掌握了跨模态结构。
summarySections.contributionsAndResults: 论文展示了融合本体与力觉信号训练的视觉编码器，能在测试时从单一图像中显著恢复出末端执行器状态，特别是力信号的表现远超纯视觉基线。更重要的是，该嵌入的空间几何结构与真实状态距离高度相关，表明其不仅是可解码的，而且内在组织方式反映了物理现实。单一通用编码器即可覆盖四种不同构型机器人，证明了跨形态泛化的可行性。
summarySections.methodsAndTechniques: 核心方法是使用带学习查询的交叉注意力层，将异构传感器流压缩为固定大小的共享潜变量。训练采用LeJEPA/SIGReg目标，通过预测被掩码模态的延迟嵌入来驱动联合表示学习。关键设计在于将机器人状态视为第一类模态，并通过有效性掩码统一不同硬件配置的输入，使得同一架构能适应有无力传感器等差异，从而实现真正的机器人无关建模。
summarySections.limitationsAndReadingValue: 当前模型局限于单时间步融合，无法捕捉速度、加速度等时间导数信息，限制了对动态过程的理解。零样本迁移到未见机器人表现不佳，且不同传感器配置下的读出头不能直接复用。尽管如此，论文清晰论证了跨模态预训练的价值，其问题设定、融合架构与消融分析极具启发性，特别适合关注具身表示学习与多模态系统设计的研究者深入阅读。

papers.title: Ego-Dynamics-Augmented World Model for Autonomous Driving with Zero-Shot Cross-Chassis Adaptation
papers.titleZh: 用于自动驾驶的具身动力学增强世界模型及零样本跨底盘适应
papers.abstract: World model (WM)-based reinforcement learning enables sample-efficient end-to-end autonomous driving learning by imagining long-horizon trajectories in latent space. However, most driving WMs operate on bird's-eye-view (BEV) representations that are inherently egocentric: the transition between consecutive frames entangles the ego vehicle's own motion with scene dynamics. As a result, the WM devotes significant capacity to recovering ego-motion from warped observations, at the cost of scene modeling fidelity and imagination accuracy. This work proposes DynaDreamer, a dynamics-augmented Dreamer-style reinforcement learning method to address this problem by augmenting the WM with an explicit ego-dynamics prior. A physics-informed ego-dynamics encoder-decoder extracts the ego-state history into a compact and identifiable context, which modulates a causal Transformer WM to condition both its prior and posterior latents. During imagination, the ego-dynamics predictor propagates this context forward to keep the ego-dynamics prior synchronized with the rollout. An information-theoretic analysis shows that conditioning on this context reduces both the predictive entropy of the observation transition and the prior--posterior Kullback--Leibler divergence, confining the WM's modeling burden to the scene dynamics beyond ego-motion. An additional benefit is zero-shot cross-chassis adaptation: the ego-dynamics context depends on identifiable chassis parameters, so that a vehicle with previously unseen dynamic characteristics can adapt the WM to the new chassis without retraining. Experiments demonstrate that DynaDreamer improves task success rates over the strongest baseline by 28% and 61% in urban and highway driving scenarios, respectively, with the advantage rising to 73% when extrapolating to unseen chassis.

summarySections.backgroundAndQuestion: 现有基于鸟瞰图（BEV）的世界模型在自动驾驶中面临一个根本瓶颈：观测变化同时包含自车运动和周围动态，导致模型需耗费大量容量从图像中反推自车动作。这不仅降低场景建模精度，还因因果倒置使不同车辆底盘难以泛化。传统方法缺乏对物理动力学的显式建模，限制了想象轨迹的真实性和跨平台适应能力。
summarySections.modelAndSetup: 论文在Carla仿真环境中评估城市与高速驾驶任务，输入为多层BEV语义图，输出为连续控制指令。模型通过隐变量序列预测未来状态并进行策略优化。评价涵盖任务成功率、碰撞率及重建质量，并特别测试在未见车型上的零样本表现，以验证其对未知动力学特性的适应能力。
summarySections.contributionsAndResults: 提出DynaDreamer，首次将可识别的车辆物理参数作为显式先验注入世界模型。该方法在城市和高速场景下分别比最强基线提升28%和61%的成功率，且在未见底盘上优势扩大至73%。结果表明，引入物理结构先验不仅能提效，还能实现无需微调的跨平台部署，改变了纯数据驱动建模的认知。
summarySections.methodsAndTechniques: 核心是构建一个物理引导的神经常微分方程编码器-解码器，从中提取自车动力学上下文（VD-context），并通过AdaLN调制Transformer的先验与后验分布。在想象过程中，该上下文随ODE预测同步更新，确保自车运动始终符合物理规律。信息论分析证明此举降低了预测熵与KL散度，使模型专注建模外部动态。
summarySections.limitationsAndReadingValue: 实验依赖仿真器提供的真值参数，真实世界中传感器噪声可能影响参数估计稳定性。此外，消融未完全分离各组件对零样本性能的独立贡献。最值得阅读的是其将物理先验与深度生成模型融合的设计思想，为具身智能系统的鲁棒性提供了新路径。

papers.title: Dynamical Vehicle Orienteering Problem for Multi-Rotor Unmanned Aerial Vehicles
papers.titleZh: 面向多旋翼无人机的动力学车辆寻路问题
papers.abstract: This paper introduces the Dynamical Vehicle Orienteering Problem (DVOP), a generalization of the Orienteering Problem (OP). The OP maximizes the reward collected from spatial targets under a limited travel budget; the DVOP extends it by accounting for both external and vehicle-actuated forces. We study the DVOP in the context of multi-rotor Unmanned Aerial Vehicle (UAV) flight planning, using a three-dimensional Point-Mass Model (PMM) constrained by maximum velocity and acceleration magnitudes and subject to gravitational acceleration, with the travel budget expressed as a maximum flight time. Because the DVOP couples reward maximization with time-optimal trajectory planning, it cannot be formulated as a simple graph problem and solved exactly without relaxing or under-actuating the vehicle dynamics. We therefore propose two solution approaches: a Branch-and-Bound (BnB) procedure that combines Non-Linear Programming (NLP) and Mixed-Integer Linear Programming (MILP) to provide high-quality solutions, and a Large Neighborhood Search (LNS) metaheuristic that supplies an initial reward bound and scales to instances intractable for the BnB. The BnB relies on a novel MILP formulation of travel costs based on minimum-time trajectory primitives through target triplets, yielding a tight reward upper bound, while the LNS uses limited thrust decomposition to compute fast, high-quality PMM trajectories. Experiments on benchmark instances show improvements of up to 37 % over state-of-the-art solutions for the Kinematic Orienteering Problem, and a real-world deployment on a multi-rotor UAV verifies the proposed PMM solution trajectories.

summarySections.backgroundAndQuestion: 传统车辆寻路问题（OP）假设直线移动和瞬时转向，忽略了真实无人机的动力学限制。本文针对多旋翼无人机任务，指出经典方法因忽略加速度约束、重力影响及推力调控而高估性能。现有基于运动学的模型要么简化动力学，要么无法保证全局最优，导致轨迹不可行或效率低下，因此需要一个融合真实物理约束的新型寻路框架。
summarySections.modelAndSetup: 论文定义了动力学车辆寻路问题（DVOP），目标是在最大飞行时间内最大化访问目标点的奖励总和。输入为目标位置与奖励值，输出为访问序列及其时间最优轨迹。模型采用三维质点动力学（PMM），受最大速度、加速度和重力约束。通过最小飞行时间作为代价函数，并结合非线性规划（NLP）与混合整数线性规划（MILP）进行求解。
summarySections.contributionsAndResults: 提出DVOP问题形式化定义，并设计两种求解方法：一是结合NLP与MILP的精确分支定界（BnB）算法，提供高质量上界；二是基于局部搜索的大邻域搜索（LNS）启发式方法，用于快速初始化与扩展求解规模。实验显示，相比现有寻路方法，奖励收集提升高达37%，且真实飞行验证了轨迹可行性。
summarySections.methodsAndTechniques: BnB方法利用预计算的目标三元组间时间最优轨迹片段构建MILP松弛模型，从而获得紧致奖励上界；LNS则采用受限推力分解（LTD）技术，在插入新目标时联合优化速度与路径。两者结合实现了组合决策与连续轨迹优化的协同，避免了传统方法中离散采样带来的次优性，提升了整体求解效率与质量。
summarySections.limitationsAndReadingValue: BnB求解耗时较长，仅适用于中小规模实例；LNS虽快但无最优性保证。此外，模型依赖理想化的质点动力学，未考虑风扰、旋转动力学或传感器延迟。尽管如此，其严谨的问题建模与混合求解框架为无人机路径规划提供了可靠基线，最值得阅读的是问题设定、MILP松弛设计与真实部署验证部分。

papers.title: The Nonsmooth Impact Direction (NSID) of Robotic Systems
papers.titleZh: 机器人系统中的非光滑冲击方向（NSID）
papers.abstract: Collisions of rigid-link robots and rigid environments are often modeled as instantaneous events. Under this idealization, the impact forces become impulsive and the system velocities nonsmooth. In this work, we systematically analyze pre- and post-impact velocities focusing on what we refer to as the nonsmooth impact direction (NSID). We show that it is a characteristic direction of a robotic impact and largely independent of contact properties. The results are directly applicable to large classes of backdrivable robotic systems with rigid links. We address particularities of systems with nonelastic and flexible joints, unconstrained as well as constrained systems. Further, we show that the approach direction w.r.t the NSID sets the direction of the impulsive force in frictional, inelastic impacts. The comprehensive theoretical analysis of this work supported by an experimental validation may serve as a foundation for future planning and control algorithms for various robotic impact applications. These can include humanoid locomotion on a slippery surface or repetitive hammering.

summarySections.backgroundAndQuestion: 机器人在执行敲击、跳跃等物理冲击任务时，碰撞会导致速度突变，传统控制器难以实时响应。现有方法常将冲击视为需规避的扰动，但忽略其作为任务一部分的潜力。本文关注的核心问题是：如何刻画机器人冲击过程中的本质动态特性，使得规划与控制能主动利用而非被动应对冲击？关键难点在于冲击瞬间的速度不连续性和对外部力的敏感性。
summarySections.modelAndSetup: 论文基于瞬时冲击假设，研究刚性连杆机器人与刚性环境碰撞前后广义速度的变化规律。输入为碰撞前的构型与速度，输出为预测的碰撞后速度。通过投影分析建立配置空间与任务空间中的映射关系，并在被动多体机构和扭矩控制机器人上进行实验验证，比较不同接近方向下的反弹路径与动量传递，以检验理论预测的一致性。
summarySections.contributionsAndResults: 提出了‘非光滑冲击方向’（NSID）这一特征方向，发现它是唯一使碰撞前后速度对齐的方向，且几乎不受接触弹性影响。实验证明，沿NSID撞击时反弹路径与入射路径重合，且在摩擦接触下动量传递垂直于表面。这揭示了机器人自身动力学与几何结构决定了冲击响应的主要模式，为设计抗冲击操作提供了可预测的物理依据。
summarySections.methodsAndTechniques: 通过将冲击映射矩阵分解为不变子空间与一维非光滑方向，从理论上导出NSID为其唯一负特征值对应的特征向量。该方向由惯性矩阵、雅可比和约束梯度共同决定，独立于恢复系数。进一步结合库仑摩擦模型，证明NSID是唯一产生纯法向冲量的方向，从而自然避免滑移。整个分析框架适用于固定基座、浮动基座及受约束系统。
summarySections.limitationsAndReadingValue: 理论依赖瞬时冲击与无摩擦假设，实际存在微小弹性与有限持续时间。实验在低速下进行以保护设备，高能量场景适用性待验证。尽管如此，NSID作为系统固有属性的结论具有普适性。最值得阅读的是其对冲击方向性的几何解释及其在任务空间中的直观表现，为冲击感知规划提供了简洁而有力的设计原则。
